case_title: E.O.C. INC A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION VS. JAMES D JEFFERSON et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS JAMES JEFFERSON AND PRIMUS INDUSTRIES INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, ALTERNATIVELY, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO JEFFERSON. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUCATION IS GRANTED AS TO PRIMUS ACCOUNT STATED BECAUSE THE LAST ITEM ON THE ACCOUNT PREDATED AUGUST 2003 AND AS TO QUANTUM MERUIT BECAUSE ALL WORK HAD CEASED BEFORE AUGUST 2005, BUT DENIED AS TO BREACH OF CONTRACT BECAUSE THE ORD DECLARATION AND ITS EXHIBITS RAISE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WHEN PLAINTIFF CEASED PERFORMING SERVICES. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUL-28-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
